metadata.name: solana_stablecoin_standard
metadata.description: Solana Stablecoin Standard (SSS) — modular on-chain stablecoin framework

docs: A modular on-chain framework supporting three compliance tiers:
- SSS-1: Minimal preset — basic mint/burn, supply tracking, no regulatory overhead
- SSS-2: Compliant preset — adds KYC whitelist, freeze/seize, compliance reporting
- SSS-3: Private preset (experimental) — allowlist-gated + Token-2022 confidential transfers
L1 — Core ledger: mint authority, burn authority, supply cap
L2 — Compliance hooks: whitelist registry, freeze registry (SSS-2 only)
L3 — Privacy layer: allowlist registry, confidential transfer extension (SSS-3 only)
L4 — Governance: admin multi-sig, preset upgrade path

instructions.name: allowlist_add
docs: Add a wallet to the SSS-3 allowlist

accounts.name: wallet
docs: The wallet to add to the allowlist

instructions.name: allowlist_remove
docs: Remove a wallet from the SSS-3 allowlist

instructions.name: burn_tokens
docs: Burn tokens from an account. SSS-2 enforces whitelist check.

instructions.name: confidential_mint_sss3
docs: Initiate a confidential mint — validates authority and recipient allowlist,
records commitment hash for auditor decryption

accounts.name: recipient_allowlist
docs: Recipient's allowlist record — must be present and active

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freeze an account — halts all transfers for that address (SSS-2 only)

instructions.name: initialize_sss1
docs: Initialize a new SSS-1 stablecoin (minimal preset)

accounts.name: mint
docs: The new token mint. Caller creates and passes this in.

instructions.name: initialize_sss2
docs: Initialize a new SSS-2 stablecoin (compliant preset)

accounts.name: compliance_vault
docs: Compliance vault — receives seized funds. Must be a token account for this mint.

instructions.name: initialize_sss3
docs: Initialize a new SSS-3 stablecoin (allowlist-gated + confidential transfers)
The mint should have Token-2022 ConfidentialTransfer extension pre-initialized
using the SDK helper `initializeConfidentialMint()` before calling this instruction.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The new token mint (must be created with ConfidentialTransfer extension pre-initialized)

accounts.name: config
docs: SSS config PDA (shared structure with SSS-1/SSS-2)

instructions.name: mint_tokens
docs: Mint tokens to a recipient. SSS-2 enforces whitelist check.

instructions.name: record_compliance_event
docs: Record a compliance event (audit trail) (SSS-2 only)

instructions.name: seize_funds
docs: Seize funds from a frozen account to the compliance vault (SSS-2 only)

accounts.name: wallet_token_account
docs: Token account of the frozen wallet

instructions.name: transfer_sss3
docs: Transfer with SSS-3 allowlist enforcement (standard amounts)

instructions.name: transfer_tokens
docs: Transfer tokens between accounts. SSS-2 enforces both accounts on whitelist.

instructions.name: unfreeze_account
docs: Unfreeze a previously frozen account (SSS-2 only)

instructions.name: upgrade_to_sss2
docs: Upgrade preset from SSS-1 to SSS-2 (one-way migration)

instructions.name: whitelist_add
docs: Add an address to the KYC whitelist (SSS-2 only)

instructions.name: whitelist_remove
docs: Remove an address from the KYC whitelist (SSS-2 only)

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller does not have the required authority

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Program is globally paused

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Invalid amount: must be greater than zero

errors.name: SupplyCapExceeded
errors.msg: Supply cap would be exceeded by this mint

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance to burn

errors.name: NotSss2
errors.msg: SSS-2 feature not available on SSS-1 preset

errors.name: RecipientNotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Recipient is not on the KYC whitelist

errors.name: SenderNotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Sender is not on the KYC whitelist

errors.name: AccountFrozen
errors.msg: Account is frozen — all operations suspended

errors.name: AccountNotFrozen
errors.msg: Account is not frozen

errors.name: WhitelistExpired
errors.msg: Whitelist entry has expired

errors.name: AlreadyWhitelisted
errors.msg: Whitelist entry already exists for this address

errors.name: NotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Address is not on the whitelist

errors.name: NotSss3
errors.msg: SSS-3 feature not available on this preset

errors.name: RecipientNotAllowlisted
errors.msg: Recipient is not on the SSS-3 allowlist

errors.name: SenderNotAllowlisted
errors.msg: Sender is not on the SSS-3 allowlist

errors.name: AllowlistExpired
errors.msg: Allowlist entry has expired

errors.name: NotAllowlisted
errors.msg: Address is not on the allowlist

errors.name: ConfidentialTransfersDisabled
errors.msg: Confidential transfers not enabled for this mint

errors.name: SupplyCapBelowCirculating
errors.msg: New supply cap cannot be lower than current circulating supply

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer

errors.name: CannotDowngrade
errors.msg: Cannot downgrade from SSS-2 to SSS-1

errors.name: ReasonTooLong
errors.msg: Reason string too long (max 128 bytes)

types.name: AllowlistRecord
docs: Separate from SSS-2 KYC whitelist — access-control focused rather than compliance.

fields.name: compliance_officer
docs: Compliance officer authority (can add/remove whitelist, issue freezes)

fields.name: whitelist_transfers
docs: Whether transfers require both sender + recipient to be whitelisted

fields.name: whitelist_mints
docs: Whether minting requires recipient to be whitelisted

fields.name: whitelist_burns
docs: Whether burning requires holder to be whitelisted

fields.name: compliance_vault
docs: Address of the compliance vault (receives seized funds)

fields.name: event_count
docs: Total number of compliance events logged

fields.name: commitment_hash
docs: Pedersen commitment hash (ElGamal ciphertext commitment of minted amount)

fields.name: allowlist_authority
docs: Authority who can add/remove allowlist entries

fields.name: require_allowlist_for_receive
docs: If true, only allowlisted addresses may receive tokens

fields.name: require_allowlist_for_send
docs: If true, only allowlisted addresses may send tokens

fields.name: confidential_transfers_enabled
docs: Whether Token-2022 confidential transfers are enabled for this mint

fields.name: auto_approve_new_accounts
docs: If true, new token accounts are auto-approved for confidential transfers

fields.name: auditor_pubkey
docs: Optional auditor ElGamal pubkey for decrypt-on-demand (32 bytes, None = no auditor)

fields.name: circulating_supply
docs: Current total supply (tracked off-chain via SPL but mirrored here for fast queries)

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether the stablecoin is globally paused

fields.name: kyc_ref
docs: Human-readable identifier (e.g. KYC provider + ID hash)
